feed.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - website
feed.subtitle: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

entry.title: Website Update
entry.content:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • b05efda feat: add GitRef tool page and nav dropdown entry
  • c2b17b1 feat: improve file tree rendering with interactive collapsible folders
  • 69dc385 feat: enhance pipeline tree display with L1/L2 file detection and conditional re
  • 9df2d03 Revert "fix: multi-condition bar chart rendering with proper CI error bars"
  • ea95a09 fix: multi-condition bar chart rendering with proper CI error bars

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
